intended_use: Contour ProtégéAI is an accessory to MIM software used for the contouring of anatomical structures in imaging data using machine-learning-based algorithms automatically. Appropriate image visualizatio
intended_use_full: Contour ProtégéAI is an accessory to MIM software used for the contouring of anatomical structures in imaging data using machine-learning-based algorithms automatically. Appropriate image visualization software must be used to review and, if necessary, edit results automatically generated by Contour ProtégéAI. Contour ProtégéAI is not intended to detect or contour lesions.
ground_truth: Manual segmentations created by consultants (physicians and dosimetrists) following published clinical contouring guidelines, reviewed and corrected by radiation oncologists, with final review by qualified MIM Software staff.
other_metrics: Dice coefficient (ranging from 0.03 to 0.97 across structures); Mean Distance to Agreement (MDA) in mm; cumulative Added Path Length (APL); localization accuracy (percentage of successful localization); external user evaluation on 3-point scale.
